title: Scheduling vacation days for specific people
excerpt:
Hi ! 
It would be very interesting to be able to add the holidays of each employee so that they are automatically reflected in the gantt and the schedule. Personally, I’m disappointed not to have this feature in the Pro …

posts.author: Bintou (FALL)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi !
It would be very interesting to be able to add the holidays of each employee so that they are automatically reflected in the gantt and the schedule. Personally, I’m disappointed not to have this feature in the Pro version.
